# Section 1: Line-by-line code completion {.unnumbered}

In this section you'll use AI coding assistants the way most people start: as a smarter autocomplete, one line at a time. You'll try inline completions, comment-driven code generation, tune your Copilot settings, meet Gander as an RStudio-friendly alternative, and finish with an honest discussion of when this lightweight approach is enough — and when it isn't.
